message:
fix(deps): update @ruvector/attention to 0.1.4 for Windows binaries

The Windows binary package @ruvector/attention-win32-x64-msvc was
published at v0.1.4, not 0.1.3. Updated dependency to match.

Published: agentic-flow@2.0.1-alpha.79

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
